The '''Tralus Ground Occupation Forces''' were the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] military unit that garrisoned [[Tralus/Legends|Tralus]] between [[Operation Roundabout]] and the [[Battle of Tralus (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tralus]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. It was headquartered in the [[Navos Center for the Performing Arts]] in the city of [[Rellidir]]. [[Hardpoint Squadron]], [[Gray Squadron (Aleph-class)|Gray Squadron]], and [[Ax Squadron]] were all under its control.<ref name="Betrayal" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}}
